query:
-- Check the customer details for the 8 unmatched billing items
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId, bi.matchStatus,
       c.name as customerName, c.externalId as custId
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;
